      Product description

      Product Description

      Enter Spidey's colourful world full of adventure with this Spidey and His Amazing Friends Friends & Foes Pack! This set of 10.16-cm (4 inch) poseable action figures features five familiar characters, including Spidey, Iron Man, Green Goblin, Electro and Dock Ock. With five Spidey toy figures on hand, children are encouraged to create their own stories and to let their big imaginations soar. Boys and girls ages 3 and up can have hours of fun by tuning in to watch Spidey and His Amazing Friends while following along with their own playtime adventures! The Friends & Foes Pack makes a great collectible Marvel present for children, but can be given as party favours or prizes, too! Children can look out for more action figures, playsets and vehicles to build their own webtastic world inspired by Spidey and Friends! (Each sold separately. Subject to availability.) Copyright MARVEL. All trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners. HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

      Directions

      No assembly required. Remove from packaging and enjoy imaginative play.

      Safety Warning

      Ages 3 and up. WARNING: Small parts may be generated.

      See more

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Top reviews from United Kingdom

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Mr T
        5.0 out of 5 stars Spd
        Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 6 January 2026
        Style Name: Hero Pack (5)Verified Purchase
        Bought these for my 3 year old son that is Spidey obsessed!

        This set definitely got his Spidey senses tingling. He has not put them down since he received them as a gift.

        The figures are a good size and they look and feel to be of good quality. The figures arms, legs and heads are articulated and seem very durable.

        The pack offers great value compared to buying the figures individually. Of note though is that the individual figures come with additional accessories.

        Regardless of the accessory situation, the pack is still a great set at a great price!
        Read more
        Helpful
         Report
      • Baz
        5.0 out of 5 stars Marvelous
        Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 10 April 2026
        Style Name: Hero Pack (5)Verified Purchase
        Larger figures than I thought...that's a good thing as far as my granddaughter was concerned. Great price for 5 figures and good quality for the market they're aimed at. Good detail and accurate likeness to the TV characters.
        Read more
        Helpful
         Report
      • Bardy
        5.0 out of 5 stars Fantastic little set of figures
        Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 1 May 2026
        Style Name: Hero Pack (5)Verified Purchase
        The Marvel Spidey and His Amazing Friends Friends & Foes Pack is an exciting action figure set perfect for young fans of the Spider-Man universe. Featuring popular characters from the series, this set encourages imaginative play and storytelling. The figures are well-crafted with vibrant colors and articulated joints, allowing for dynamic poses and interactive fun. Ideal for collectors and kids alike, this pack brings the thrill of superhero adventures to life. Overall, it’s a great addition to any Marvel or Spidey fan’s collection, combining quality and entertainment in one package.
        Read more

      About this Item

      • MULTIPACK WITH 5 ACTION FIGURES: the Friends & Foes Pack includes favourite heroes and baddies: Spidey, Iron Man, Dock Ock, Green Goblin and Electro
      • POSEABLE 10-CM FIGURES: each 10.16-cm (4 inch) character features movable head, arms and legs for easy action posing during playtime
      • DURABLE TOYS FOR PRESCHOOLERS: this Spidey and Friends toy set can withstand toddler playtime and pretend action-packed adventures
      • ENCOURAGES CREATIVE STORYTELLING: boys and girls ages 3 and up will feel inspired to create their own stories, or recreate favourite moments inspired by the Disney Junior programme
      • SHARE AND PLAY WITH FRIENDS: this action figure set allows preschoolers to share with all their friends and encourage taking turns to play as favourite characters

      Product description

      Product Description
      Enter Spidey's colourful world full of adventure with this Spidey and His Amazing Friends Friends & Foes Pack! This set of 10.16-cm (4 inch) poseable action figures features five familiar characters, including Spidey, Iron Man, Green Goblin, Electro and Dock Ock. With five Spidey toy figures on hand, children are encouraged to create their own stories and to let their big imaginations soar. Boys and girls ages 3 and up can have hours of fun by tuning in to watch Spidey and His Amazing Friends while following along with their own playtime adventures! The Friends & Foes Pack makes a great collectible Marvel present for children, but can be given as party favours or prizes, too! Children can look out for more action figures, playsets and vehicles to build their own webtastic world inspired by Spidey and Friends! (Each sold separately. Subject to availability.) Copyright MARVEL. All trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners. HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.
      Directions
      No assembly required. Remove from packaging and enjoy imaginative play.
      Safety Warning
      Ages 3 and up. WARNING: Small parts may be generated.

      Safety Information:

      Ages 3 and up. WARNING: Small parts may be generated.

      Directions:

      No assembly required. Remove from packaging and enjoy imaginative play.

      cpsia_subject_specific_additional_warning

      Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years. For use under adult supervision

      2. Manufacturer's minimum age: 3 years
